title: Make Contact Us and Our Services buttons translucent

requirements.text: In the Hero section (frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx), update the 'Contact Us' and 'Our Services' CTA buttons to have a translucent/frosted semi-transparent appearance. Apply a semi-transparent background (e.g., white or navy with low opacity), a subtle backdrop-blur effect, and a light border to achieve a frosted-glass look that complements the existing maritime navy/seafoam theme. Ensure text remains legible and hover states are preserved.

quotes: Make the contact us and our service button translucent
Making the Contact Us and Our Services buttons translucent now — applying a frosted, semi-transparent styling that keeps them elegant within the maritime theme!

acceptanceCriteria: The 'Contact Us' button in the Hero section has a semi-transparent background with backdrop-blur styling.
The 'Our Services' button in the Hero section has a semi-transparent background with backdrop-blur styling.
Both buttons retain legible text with sufficient contrast against the hero background.
Both buttons have visible hover/focus states consistent with the maritime theme.
The frosted/translucent styling does not break the existing layout or responsiveness on mobile and desktop.

constraints: Do not alter button functionality or scroll behavior.
Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths.
Preserve the existing maritime navy/seafoam color palette.
nonGoals: Changing button labels or CTA text.
Modifying buttons in any section other than the Hero.
Altering the Navigation, Contact, or Services section styling.
